seoTitle: Marks Point vs Marlee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Marks Point vs Marlee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marks Point and Marlee.
heading: Marks Point vs Marlee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marks Point, New South Wales and Marlee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marlee has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Marks Point (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marks Point or Marlee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marks Point has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Marlee scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marks Point scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Marlee scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marks Point or Marlee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marlee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
